debrastefania: shows [Jd Th] (two pair, Nines and Fours)
Chipmunk6352 collected 250 from side pot

Chipmunk6352 collected 3078 from main pot
Chipmunk6352 wins $1.10 for eliminating debrastefania and their own bounty increases by $0.88 to $2.64
Chipmunk6352 wins $0.82 for eliminating scorza23 and their own bounty increases by $1.10 to $3.74
debrastefania finished the tournament in 3rd place
scorza23 finished the tournament in 4th place
